data.content: Plan needs revision before implementation. The current proposal only warns on unknown artifact_type values, but the acceptance requires validated per-step output declarations for a defined target set. It also leaves the canonical target vocabulary unresolved: runtime currently uses remote_main and commit, while the requirement calls out merged_main_commit and live_deployment. Please revise the plan to define one canonical runtime/output vocabulary, specify how legacy OutputMode/remote_main values normalize into it, decide whether unknown target strings are rejected or mapped through an explicit extension mechanism, and add tests that cover both valid canonical targets and backward-compatible legacy inputs.
